# Junk in the Truck Co

> Tampa Bay junk removal and light demolition. Fast, affordable, same-day service. Call 844-858-6546.

Junk in the Truck Co is a locally owned, licensed and insured junk removal and demolition company serving Tampa, South Tampa, St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Brandon, Riverview, Town 'n' Country, Carrollwood, Temple Terrace, and Westchase, FL. We handle residential and commercial jobs, recycle and donate whenever possible, and provide free on-site estimates.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Service overview, pricing, and how it works.
- [Our Story](/our-story): Company background and values.
- [Services](/services): Full service catalog.
- [Pricing](/pricing): How pricing works and what to expect.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about junk removal and demolition.

## Junk Removal

- [Junk Removal Hub](/services/junk-removal/): All junk removal services.
- [Residential Junk Removal](/services/junk-removal/residential/): Home cleanouts and household junk.
- [Commercial Junk Removal](/services/junk-removal/commercial/): Office, retail, and property management.
- [Appliance Removal](/services/junk-removal/appliance-removal/): Refrigerators, washers, dryers, and more.
- [Clean Outs](/services/junk-removal/clean-outs/): Full property cleanouts.
- [Garage Cleanout](/services/junk-removal/garage-cleanout/): Garage clearing and hauling.
- [Estate Cleanout](/services/junk-removal/estate-cleanout/): Compassionate estate clearing.
- [Furniture Removal](/services/junk-removal/furniture-removal/): Couches, beds, dressers, and more.
- [Hot Tub Removal](/services/junk-removal/hot-tub-removal/): Disassembly and hauling.
- [Yard Waste Removal](/services/junk-removal/yard-waste-removal/): Branches, brush, and debris.
- [Hoarder Cleanup](/services/junk-removal/hoarder-cleanup/): Discreet, judgement-free service.
- [Homeless Encampment Cleanup](/services/junk-removal/homeless-encampment-cleanup/): Property cleanup for owners and municipalities.

## Demolition

- [Demolition Services](/services/demolition/): Light demolition overview.
- [Shed Removal](/services/demolition/shed-removal/): Shed teardown and hauling.
- [Playset Removal](/services/demolition/playset-removal/): Swingset and playset disassembly.

- [Dumpster Rental](/services/dumpster-rental/): Roll-off dumpster rentals.
